_readme: Randon One Block — random block generator config. Edit while the server is stopped, or run /randomblock reload after changes.
_how_weights_work: Every eligible block gets a weight. Default is default_weight (1). weight_overrides sets per-block weights. Higher weight = more likely. Example: crafting_table at 3 and default 1 means crafting_table is 3x as likely as a normal block. Set weight to 0 in overrides to exclude a block without using blacklist. Total chance for one block = its_weight / sum_of_all_weights.
_collision_filter: When require_full_collision_cube is true, only blocks whose default collision box is a full 1x1x1 cube are added to the pool (crops, flowers, rails, pots, etc. are excluded). Set require_full_collision_cube to false to restore the old all-blocks behavior.
